importExport.title: Import / Export
importExport.description: Import issues from other project management tools or export your data.
importExport.importDescription: Import your existing issues, projects, and workflows from another tool. The import assistant will guide you through the process.
importExport.cliImportDescription: Use the Linear CLI importer to migrate large datasets from the command line. Supports batch imports and custom field mapping.
importExport.exportDescription: Export all issues in this workspace as a CSV file. The export includes issue titles, descriptions, statuses, assignees, priorities, and labels.
importExport.exportToast: Preparing your export... You will receive an email when it is ready.
